info.name: Rodney API
info.description: Complete API collection organized by screen. Two main sections: App APIs (student-facing) and Dashboard APIs (admin panel).

item.name: App APIs
item.description: Student/user-facing mobile app APIs organized by screen.

request.description: Register a new student account. Password must include upper, lower, number, special char and be 8+ chars.
Login with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens. deviceToken is optional — used for push notifications.

exec: console.log('Student tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description: Logout the current user. deviceToken is required — server removes it from push notification list.
Registration flow: new user OTP verify korle auto-login hoy. Returns access + refresh tokens. refreshToken also set as httpOnly cookie.

exec: console.log('Auto-login tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description: Forgot Password flow: already verified user OTP verify korle reset token return kore. Use this token in Reset Password request.
Reset password using token from email link. Token is sent in body, NOT in Authorization header. Password must be 8-128 chars.
Body is optional if refresh token is sent via cookies.
Get all published courses for onboarding selection. Public endpoint.
Bulk enroll in multiple courses during onboarding. Auth: STUDENT.
Aggregated home data: name, points, streak, progress (course + quiz), enrolled courses (max 10), recent badges (max 5). Auth: STUDENT.
Browse all published courses with student's enrollment status. Enrolled courses include enrollment details, non-enrolled return enrollment: null. Auth: STUDENT.
Enroll in a course. Primary trigger: 'Start Course' button on browse screen. On success, navigate to GET /courses/:slug/student-detail. Auth: STUDENT.

item.name: Get Course by ID or Slug

request.description: Public. Accepts either MongoDB ObjectId or course slug.
Auth: STUDENT. Returns course detail with curriculum (visible lessons only) and enrollment progress. enrollment is null if not enrolled.
Public. Returns all lessons in a module.
Auth required.
Mark lesson as completed. Updates completion %. Auth: STUDENT.
Get quiz without correct answers. Auth: STUDENT.
Start a new quiz attempt. Returns existing in-progress if any. Auth: STUDENT.
Submit answers. MCQ/TRUE_FALSE auto-graded. Auth: STUDENT.
View result of a completed quiz attempt. Auth: STUDENT.
Submit assignment for a lesson. Auth: STUDENT.
Overall progress: completion %, points, streak, per-course progress. Auth: STUDENT.
Monthly activity calendar with summary. Returns only active days — empty days filled by frontend. Auth: STUDENT.
Current and longest streak. Auth: STUDENT.
Completed quiz attempts with pagination. Returns: quizTitle, courseName, percentage, passed, completedAt. Auth: STUDENT.
Returns totalBadges (all active), earnedBadges (count), and badges array (name, icon, earnedAt). Auth: STUDENT.
Total points and points history. Auth: STUDENT.
Points + top badge + total badges summary. Auth: STUDENT.
All available badges. Auth required.

formdata.description: Optional. Link post to a course.

formdata.value: Can someone explain closures in JavaScript? I'm confused about...

request.description: Create post with optional image. Auth required.
Community feed, newest first. Optional courseId filter. Auth required.
Single post with replies. Auth required.
Delete own post. Auth required.
Toggle like on a post. Auth required.
Top-level reply — post er directly under boshbe. parentReplyId na dile simple reply hoy.
Nested reply — ekta top-level reply er under boshbe. parentReplyId = jei reply er reply korte chao tar ID. Max 1 level nesting (nested reply er reply kora jay na).
Delete own reply. Auth required.
Get current user's posts. Same response as Get Feed. Auth required.

formdata.description: Optional. Send "null" to remove course link.
Optional. Send "true" to remove existing image without replacing.

request.description: Edit own post. At least one field required. Author-only. Auth required.
Edit own reply. Author-only. Auth required.
Lightweight endpoint for course filter dropdown. Returns published courses with _id + title only. Auth required (STUDENT or SUPER_ADMIN).
Paginated notifications + unread count. Auth required.
Supports file upload for profilePicture.
Returns totalBadges (all active), earnedBadges (count), and badges array (name, icon, earnedAt). Auth: STUDENT.
List all published legal pages. Public.
Get legal page by slug. Public.
Change password from profile screen. Requires current password verification. Auth required.
Clears refreshToken cookie + removes device token for push notifications. deviceToken required in body. Client side: clear stored tokens → navigate to login.
Create 1-on-1 chat. Returns existing if already exists. Auth required.
All chats for authenticated user. Auth required.
Send message with optional attachments. Max 10 files total. Auth required.
Paginated messages for a chat. Auth required.
Mark all messages in chat as read. Auth required.
Public user profile details. No auth required.

item.name: Dashboard APIs
item.description: Admin dashboard APIs organized by screen.

request.description: Admin login using collection variables {{adminEmail}} and {{adminPassword}}. deviceToken is optional — used for push notifications.

exec: console.log('Admin tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description: Logout the currently authenticated admin. deviceToken required — server removes it from push notification list.
Change the authenticated admin's password.
Obtain a new access token using the refresh token.

Get dashboard summary with growth deltas — totalStudents, activeStudents, totalCourses, completionRate. Each metric returns { value, growth, growthType }. Uses AggregationBuilder.calculateGrowth(). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

query.description: Rolling window — koto month er data (default: 6)

request.description: Get enrollment + completion trend data (monthly grouped, cross-year rolling window). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

query.description: Filter by type: ENROLLMENT | COMPLETION | QUIZ_ATTEMPT (empty = all)

request.description: Get unified recent activity feed — single sorted array with { type, title, timestamp }. Supports ?type= filter for tabs. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

Get student management stats — totalStudents and activeStudents (role:STUDENT only, deleted excluded) with monthly growth metrics (thisPeriodCount, lastPeriodCount, growth%, growthType). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all users with pagination, search, sort, and filter. Returns enrollmentCount + lastActiveDate per user. Supports status/role filters. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get full user detail by ID. Returns profile fields + courseStats (total/active/completed/dropped/avgCompletion) + enrolledCourses[] with progress. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Block a user by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Unblock a previously blocked user by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Admin update a user's name, email, status, role, or verified flag. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Soft delete a user (sets status to DELETE). Cannot delete your own account. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Export all users as CSV. Supports same filters as list (status, role, searchTerm). Use format=xlsx for Excel. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

formdata.value: A comprehensive course covering HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.

request.description: Create a new course with thumbnail upload. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

query.description: Filter by status: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED, SCHEDULED (empty = all)

request.description: Get all courses regardless of status. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Supports filtering by status query param.

item.name: Get Course by ID or Slug

request.description: Get a single course by its ID or slug. Public endpoint.

formdata.value: Updated course description with new content.

request.description: Update an existing course. Status can be DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED, or SCHEDULED. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a course by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Add a new module to a course. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Reorder modules within a course. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Update a module's details. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a module from a course. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

formdata.value: Learn the basics of HTML structure and tags.

request.description: Create a new lesson in a module. Type can be VIDEO, READING, or ASSIGNMENT. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all lessons within a module. Public endpoint.
Get a specific lesson by ID. Requires authentication.
Reorder lessons within a module. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Update a lesson's details. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a lesson from a module. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Toggle the visibility of a lesson. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all enrollments with pagination and sorting. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Update the status of an enrollment (e.g., SUSPENDED). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all enrolled students for a specific course. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all student enrollments with quiz scores and completion percentage. Each row is a student-course pair. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Export student gradebook as CSV or XLSX. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

query.description: Search by post title or content

request.description: Get all community posts with pagination, sorting, search, and course filter. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Top-level reply — post er directly under boshbe. parentReplyId na dile simple reply hoy. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Nested reply — ekta top-level reply er under boshbe. parentReplyId = jei reply er reply korte chao tar ID. Max 1 level nesting (nested reply er reply kora jay na). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

formdata.description: Optional. Send "null" to remove course link.
Optional. Send "true" to remove existing image without replacing.

request.description: Edit own post. Author-only — admin can only edit posts they created. At least one field required. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Edit own reply. Author-only — admin can only edit replies they created. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a community post by ID. Admin can delete any post. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a community reply by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Lightweight endpoint for course filter dropdown. Returns published courses with _id + title only. Auth required (STUDENT or SUPER_ADMIN).

Create a new quiz with questions in a single request. Supports 3 question types: MCQ (multiple choice with options), TRUE_FALSE (2 options: True/False), SHORT_ANSWER (descriptive, no options — requires manual grading). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all quizzes with pagination and search. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get a quiz by ID including correct answers. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Update a quiz's title, status, or settings. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a quiz by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Add a single question to an existing quiz. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Supports MCQ, TRUE_FALSE, and SHORT_ANSWER types.
Update a question's text, marks, or options. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a question from a quiz. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Reorder questions within a quiz. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all attempts for a specific quiz. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all admin notifications with pagination. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.

item.name: Mark All Admin Notifications as Read

request.description: Mark all admin notifications as read. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Mark a single admin notification as read. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get user engagement analytics data. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get course completion analytics data. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get quiz performance analytics data. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get detailed analytics for a specific course. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get detailed analytics for a specific student. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get feedback summary stats — total reviews with growth, average rating, pending responses, rating distribution. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all feedback entries with pagination and sorting. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get a single feedback entry with student and course details. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Add an admin response to a feedback entry. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Delete a feedback entry by ID. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get all badges with pagination. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Update a badge's description, criteria threshold, or isActive status. Only these fields are allowed — name, criteria.type, and icon are fixed (pre-defined badges). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get overall gamification statistics. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get the gamification leaderboard with pagination. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Create a new legal page (e.g., Terms of Service, Privacy Policy). Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Content is optional — can create with just title and add content later.
Get all legal pages. Public endpoint.
Get a specific legal page by its slug. Public endpoint.
Update a legal page by slug. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. Title update korle slug auto-regenerate hoy. Duplicate title dile 409 CONFLICT.
Delete a legal page by slug. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get the authenticated user's own profile.
Update the authenticated user's profile with optional profile picture upload.
